description: §40.9.5 — a page with no `<auth role>` content gate (sensitive content is expected to be withheld server-side, not via `<auth role>`) fires no W-AUTH-CONTENT-NOT-GATED. The clean control: the lint keys strictly on role-naming auth-role-block gates.
rationale: §40.9.5: flagContentNotGated only fires for a gate whose siteKind is auth-role-block AND whose role is non-null. With no such gate present, nothing leaks role-gated markup and the lint stays silent.
